creator: michaelo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dan Langille from comment #0)

Looking at the Perl code there should be a SSL_options->SSL_ca_path. Set the one for FreeBSD and you are done. I have done the same for PHP composer recently: https://github.com/composer/ca-bundle/commit/3b1fc3f0be055baa7c6258b1467849c3e8204eb2

Ideally, this is patched upstream. For now, I have been patching all ports on my way for our complex internal CA setup. Rust with uv is next.
